title: Lusail Stadium
extract: Lusail Stadium is a football stadium in Lusail, Qatar. Owned by the Qatar Football Association, it is the largest stadium in Qatar and the Middle East by capacity; one of eight stadiums built for the 2022 FIFA World Cup, it hosted the 2022 FIFA World Cup final game between Argentina and France on 18 December 2022. As of 2022 it was the second largest football stadium in Asia, with a plan to eventually reduce capacity from 88,966 to 40,000.
extract_html: Lusail Stadium is a football stadium in Lusail, Qatar. Owned by the Qatar Football Association, it is the largest stadium in Qatar and the Middle East by capacity; one of eight stadiums built for the 2022 FIFA World Cup, it hosted the 2022 FIFA World Cup final game between Argentina and France on 18 December 2022. As of 2022 it was the second largest football stadium in Asia, with a plan to eventually reduce capacity from 88,966 to 40,000.
